56.reason: [This loop may access beyond initialized elements if zero coefficients appear before the end of valid data, and it doesn't ensure terms are printed in descending exponent order after combining like terms correctly. Also, after `domultiply`, zero terms are scattered and not compacted, so this condition is unreliable.]
